note.en: If not paired with [[character:chongyun]], [[ability:skill]] takes priority over [[ability:na]]s.
note.fr: Si [[character:kaeya]] n'est pas associé à [[character:chongyun]], le [[ability:skill]] prend la priorité sur ses [[ability:na|attaques normales]].
note.it: Se [[character:kaeya]] non è abbinato a [[character:chongyun]], l'[[ability:skill]] ha la priorità sull'[[ability:na]].
